en: Long ago, at many times and in many ways, God spoke to our fathers by the prophets,
zh: 神在古時候，曾經多次用種種方法，藉著先知向我們的祖先說話；

en: but in these last days he has spoken to us by his Son, whom he appointed the heir of all things, through whom also he created the world.
zh: 在這末後的日子，卻藉著他的兒子向我們說話。 神已經立他作萬有的承受者，並且藉著他創造了宇宙 。

en: He is the radiance of the glory of God and the exact imprint of his nature, and he upholds the universe by the word of his power. After making purification for sins, he sat down at the right hand of the Majesty on high,
zh: 他是 神榮耀的光輝，是 神本質的真象，用自己帶有能力的話掌管萬有；他作成了潔淨罪惡的事，就坐在高天至尊者的右邊。

en: having become as much superior to angels as the name he has inherited is more excellent than theirs.
zh: 他所承受的名比天使的名更尊貴，所以他遠比天使崇高。

en: For to which of the angels did God ever say, "You are my Son, today I have begotten you"? Or again, "I will be to him a father, and he shall be to me a son"?
zh: 神曾對哪一個天使說過： “你是我的兒子， 我今日生了你”呢？ 或者說： “我要作他的父親， 他要作我的兒子”呢？

en: And again, when he brings the firstborn into the world, he says, "Let all God's angels worship him."
zh: 神差遣長子到世上來的時候，又說： “ 神所有的天使都要拜他。”

en: Of the angels he says, "He makes his angels winds, and his ministers a flame of fire."
zh: 論到天使，說： “ 神以他的天使為風， 以他的僕役為火燄。”

en: But of the Son he says, "Your throne, O God, is forever and ever, the scepter of uprightness is the scepter of your kingdom.
zh: 但是論到兒子，卻說： “ 神啊！你的寶座是永永遠遠的， 你國的權杖，是公平的權杖。

en: You have loved righteousness and hated wickedness; therefore God, your God, has anointed you with the oil of gladness beyond your companions."
zh: 你喜愛公義，恨惡不法， 所以， 神，就是你的 神， 用喜樂的油膏抹你，勝過膏抹你的同伴。”

en: And, "You, Lord, laid the foundation of the earth in the beginning, and the heavens are the work of your hands;
zh: 又說： “主啊！你起初立了地的根基， 天也是你手的工作。

en: they will perish, but you remain; they will all wear out like a garment,
zh: 天地都要毀滅，你卻長存； 天地都要像衣服一樣漸漸殘舊，

en: like a robe you will roll them up, like a garment they will be changed. But you are the same, and your years will have no end."
zh: 你要把天地像外套一樣捲起來， 天地就像衣服一樣被更換； 只有你永不改變， 你的年數也沒有窮盡。”

en: And to which of the angels has he ever said, "Sit at my right hand until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet"?
zh: 神可曾向哪一個天使說： “你坐在我的右邊， 等我使你的仇敵作你的腳凳”呢？

en: Are they not all ministering spirits sent out to serve for the sake of those who are to inherit salvation?
zh: 天使不都是服役的靈，奉差遣為那些要承受救恩的人效勞嗎？
